zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Sanford於大約1230年出生在英國賀特福爾時，她的父親Gilbert de Saunford32歲，母親Loretta la Zouche20歲。她於1252年2月22日與Robert de Vere 5th Earl of Oxford在英國英格蘭奧可福爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1312年9月7日在英國艾可享年83歲，埋葬在英國艾可易阿爾斯 可爾內。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Sanford于大约1230年出生在英国賀特福爾时，她的父亲Gilbert de Saunford32岁，母亲Loretta la Zouche20岁。她于1252年2月22日与Robert de Vere 5th Earl of Oxford在英国英格兰奧可福爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1312年9月7日在英国艾可享年83岁，埋葬在英国艾可易阿爾斯 可爾內。

nameMeanings.name: Sanford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Sandford
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places in England with names derived from Old English sand ‘sand’ + ford ‘ford, river crossing’, such as Sandford in Warcop (Westmorland), Sandford in Sonning and Dry Sandford in Abingdon (both Berkshire), Sandford on Thames and Sandford Saint Martin (both Oxfordshire), Great and Little Sampford (Essex), Sandford Orcas (Dorset), Sandford, Sampford Courtney, Sampford Peverell, and Sampford Spiney (all Devon), Sampford Arundel and Sampford Brett (both Somerset), and Sandford (Shropshire). See also Sandiford .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Sanford was born about 1230, in Hertfordshire, England, her father, Gilbert de Saunford, was 32 and her mother, Loretta la Zouche, was 20. She married Robert de Vere 5th Earl of Oxford on 22 February 1252, in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 7 September 1312, in Essex, England, at the age of 83, and was buried in Earls Colne, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Sanford est née environ 1230, à Hertfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Gilbert de Saunford, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Loretta la Zouche, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Robert de Vere 5th Earl of Oxford le 22 février 1252, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 7 septembre 1312, à Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 83 ans, et a été enterrée à Earls Colne, Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Sanford um 1230 in Hertfordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gilbert de Saunford 32 und ihre Mutter Loretta la Zouche 20. Sie hat am 22. Februar 1252 in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom Robert de Vere 5th Earl of Oxford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 7. September 1312 im Alter von 83 Jahren in Essex, England und wurde in Earls Colne, Essex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Sanford è nata il circa 1230 nel Hertfordshire, England, sua padre, Gilbert de Saunford, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Loretta la Zouche, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Robert de Vere 5th Earl of Oxford il 22 febbraio 1252, nel Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 7 settembre 1312, nel Essex, England, all'età di 83 anni, e fu sepolta a Earls Colne, Essex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Sanfordが約1230年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Gilbert de Saunfordは32歳，母Loretta la Zoucheは20歳であった。1252年2月22日にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアでRobert de Vere 5th Earl of Oxfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1312年9月7日にイギリスエセックスで83歳で死去し，イギリスエセックスエアルルズ コルンにて埋葬された。

ko.Lewes St Anne, Lewes, Sussex, England: 영국 수세스 루스 루스 스트 앤
ko.lifeSummary: Alice Sanford(이)가 대략 1230년 영국 허트퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gilbert de Saunford(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Loretta la Zouche(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1252년 2월 22일 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르에서 Robert de Vere 5th Earl of Oxford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1312년 9월 7일 영국 에세스에서 83세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스 에를스 코니에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Sanford nasceu aproximadamente 1230, em Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Gilbert de Saunford, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Loretta la Zouche, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert de Vere 5th Earl of Oxford em 22 de fevereiro de 1252, em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 7 de setembro de 1312, em Essex, Inglaterra, com 83 anos, e foi sepultada em Earls Colne, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.Lewes St Anne, Lewes, Sussex, England: львесь ст анн, львесь, суссекс, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Sanford родилась около 1230 г. в местности хиртфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Gilbert de Saunford было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Loretta la Zouche, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Vere 5th Earl of Oxford 22 февраля 1252 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 7 сентября 1312 г. в местности эссекс, Англия в возрасте 83 лет и была похоронена в местности эарлс колн, эссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Sanford nació aproximadamente 1230, en Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Gilbert de Saunford, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Loretta la Zouche, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Robert de Vere 5th Earl of Oxford el 22 de febrero de 1252, en Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 7 de septiembre de 1312, en Essex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 83 años, y fue sepultada en Earls Colne, Essex, Inglaterra.
